service_grid.title: Service Grid View
service_grid.description: Visual grid of all registered services with health status

topology_map.title: Service Topology Map
topology_map.description: Graph visualization of service dependencies and connections

health_timeline.title: Service Health Timeline
health_timeline.description: Historical health status of all services

service_usage.query: SELECT service_id, COUNT(*) as calls, AVG(duration) as avg_latency FROM registry_logs WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY service_id

health_trends.query: SELECT service_id, health_status, COUNT(*) as changes FROM health_checks WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY service_id, health_status

dependency_impact.query: SELECT source_service, target_service, failure_impact_score FROM dependency_graph WHERE status = 'active'
